name: Mom's 4-star Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 oz cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased pie dish.
4. Place on a baking sheet and bake for 35-40 minutes or until set.
5. Let cool completely before serving.
